name: European Union / EEA

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Regulation (EU) 2016/425
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Regulation (EU) 2017/745 (MDR)
regulatory_framework.harmonized_standards_journal: Official Journal of the European Union (OJEU)
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: Member State market surveillance authorities under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020

category_ii.conformity: EU Type Examination (Module B) + Module C

category_iii.description: Risks of death or irreversible harm
category_iii.conformity: EU Type Exam (Module B) + Module C2/D

language_requirements: Instructions in official language(s) of Member State of sale

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: OSHA 29 CFR Part 1910 (Subpart I - PPE), 29 CFR 1910.132-138
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: FDA 21 CFR Parts 800-898, 510(k) Premarket Notification
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: OSHA inspections, FDA post-market surveillance (MDR 21 CFR Part 803)
regulatory_framework.consensus_standards: ANSI/ISEA, ASTM, NFPA standards incorporated by reference

industrial.description: NIOSH approval for respirators; ANSI/ISEA compliance for other PPE

name: United Kingdom (Great Britain)

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: UK PPE Regulations 2018 (SI 2018/390) as amended by Product Safety and Metrology etc. (Amendment) Regulations 2024
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: UK Medical Devices Regulations 2002 (SI 2002/618) as amended
regulatory_framework.designated_standards: UK Designated Standards list published by HSE
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: OPSS under the UK Market Surveillance Framework

marking_requirements.gb: UKCA marking mandatory from 2025 for GB market
marking_requirements.ni: UKNI marking + CE marking under Northern Ireland Protocol

authorized_representative_required: UK Responsible Person (UKRP) required for non-UK manufacturers

name: People's Republic of China

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: 《产品质量法》《安全生产法》《特种劳动防护用品安全标志管理规定》
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: 《医疗器械监督管理条例》(State Council Order No. 739)
regulatory_framework.industrial_ppe_certification: 特种劳动防护用品安全标志 (LA) + 生产许可证 (SC)
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: 省市级市场监管局, NMPA飞行检查, 应急管理部专项检查

industrial.la: 特种劳动防护用品需取得LA安全标志
industrial.sc: 需取得全国工业产品生产许可证

legal_agent_required: 境内责任人 (Local Responsible Entity) required for imported devices

name: Japan

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Industrial Safety and Health Act (ISHA), Ordinance on Industrial Safety and Health
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Pharmaceutical and Medical Device Act (PMD Act)
regulatory_framework.standards_system: JIS (Japanese Industrial Standards), JIS T series for PPE
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: MHLW/PMDA inspections, prefectural labour bureau inspections

industrial.description: JIS certification (voluntary) or Type Examination by registered body

market_authorization_holder_required: MAH (製造販売業者) or DMAH (選任製造販売業者) required

name: Republic of Korea

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Occupational Safety and Health Act (OSHA), KOSHA Notice on PPE
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Medical Device Act (MDA)
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: MFDS GMP inspections, KOSHA workplace compliance inspections

industrial.safety_certification: KCs Safety Certification (韩国安全认证)

ppe_certification_types.kf_respirator: KF80/KF94/KF99 under MFDS Health Mask Standard

importer_requirements: Importer must be registered with MFDS for medical devices

name: Canada

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Canada Occupational Health and Safety Regulations (COHSR) Part XII, CSA standards
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Medical Devices Regulations (SOR/98-282) under Food and Drugs Act
regulatory_framework.medical_device_license: MDL (Medical Device Licence) for Class II-IV, MDEL for Class I
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: Health Canada post-market surveillance, CSA periodic audits

industrial.description: CSA certification or equivalent laboratory accreditation per provincial OHS regulations

regulatory_correspondent_required: Establishment must hold MDEL or use regulatory correspondent

name: Australia

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Work Health and Safety (WHS) Regulations, AS/NZS standards
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Therapeutic Goods Act 1989, Therapeutic Goods (Medical Devices) Regulations 2002
regulatory_framework.artg: Australian Register of Therapeutic Goods (ARTG) inclusion required
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: TGA post-market monitoring and recalls, state WHS regulator inspections

medical.class_ii-iv: TGA Conformity Assessment Certificate + ARTG inclusion

industrial.description: AS/NZS certification by NATA-accredited labs or JAS-ANZ accredited bodies

sponsor_required: Australian Sponsor required for overseas manufacturers

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: NR-6 (Norma Regulamentadora No. 6) - Equipamento de Proteção Individual, MTE Portaria No. 451/2014
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: ANVISA RDC 185/2001 (Medical Device Registration), RDC 16/2013 (GMP)
regulatory_framework.caepi: Certificado de Aprovação de EPI (CAEPI) mandatory for all PPE sold in Brazil
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: ANVISA inspections, MTE labour inspections, INMETRO market sampling

industrial.caepi: CAEPI certificate mandatory, renewed every 5 years

name: India

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Factories Act 1948, BIS (ISI Mark) certification, DGMS approval (mining PPE)
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Medical Devices Rules 2017 under Drugs & Cosmetics Act, CDSCO
regulatory_framework.bis_certification: ISI Mark mandatory for 69 PPE products under BIS certification scheme
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: BIS market surveillance, State FDA inspections, CDSCO post-market vigilance

industrial.isi_mark: BIS ISI Mark (mandatory for listed products)

authorized_agent_required: Indian Authorized Agent required for overseas manufacturers

name: Gulf Cooperation Council
name_zh: 海湾合作委员会（海湾六国）

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: GSO Technical Regulation for PPE (BD-142004-01), GSO Conformity Tracking Symbol (GCTS)
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: GSO Technical Regulation for Medical Devices, individual state regulations
regulatory_framework.certification: G-Mark / GCTS Certification required
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: GSO notified bodies + individual state authorities

ppe_certification_types.g_mark: G-mark Certification (GCTS) mandatory for PPE under GSO regulation
ppe_certification_types.sfda: SFDA registration for medical devices in Saudi Arabia
ppe_certification_types.esma: ESMA Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) for UAE

authorized_representative_required: Local authorized representative required in each member state

name: Switzerland

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: SR 930.115 (Verordnung über die Sicherheit von persönlichen Schutzausrüstungen, PSA-Verordnung) based on EU 2016/425
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: MedDO (Medical Devices Ordinance SR 812.213) based on EU MDR 2017/745, with Swiss-specific provisions
regulatory_framework.mutual_recognition: Mutual Recognition Agreement (MRA) with EU for conformity assessment
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: SECO and Swissmedic post-market surveillance

language_requirements: German, French, or Italian (per region of sale)
authorized_representative_required: Swiss Authorized Representative (CH-REP) required for non-Swiss manufacturers

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: PPE Regulation (Kişisel Koruyucu Donanım Yönetmeliği) harmonized with EU 2016/425 under EU-Turkey Customs Union
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Medical Device Regulation harmonized with EU MDR 2017/745
regulatory_framework.certification: Turkish Notified Body (Onaylanmış Kuruluş) certification required
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: Ministry of Trade and TİTCK market surveillance

name: Eurasian Economic Union

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: TR CU 019/2011 (Technical Regulation on PPE Safety), GOST standards
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: EAEU Medical Device Registration per EAEU Rules
regulatory_framework.certification: EAC Certification (ЕАС) for PPE, EAC Declaration/Registration for medical devices
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: State market surveillance authorities in each member state

authorized_representative_required: EAC Authorized Representative based in EAEU territory required

name: Singapore

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) Act, SS (Singapore Standards)
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Health Products Act (Medical Devices) Regulations 2010
regulatory_framework.certification: HSA medical device registration; SS compliance for industrial PPE
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: HSA post-market vigilance, MOM workplace inspections

registrant_required: Singapore-based registrant required for medical device registration

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: NOM (Normas Oficiales Mexicanas), STPS regulations for workplace PPE
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Ley General de Salud, Reglamento de Insumos para la Salud, COFEPRIS
regulatory_framework.certification: NOM certification mandatory for specific PPE products; COFEPRIS Sanitary Registration for medical devices
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: COFEPRIS post-market surveillance, STPS workplace inspections

name: South Africa

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Occupational Health and Safety Act (OHSA) 85 of 1993, SANS standards, NRCS compulsory specifications
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Medicines and Related Substances Act, SAHPRA Medical Device Regulations
authority: Department of Employment and Labour (industrial PPE)
regulatory_framework.certification: NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) for regulated PPE; SAHPRA medical device licence
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: NRCS inspections, SAHPRA post-market monitoring

local_representative_required: South African Responsible Person required for medical devices

name: Thailand

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Occupational Safety Health and Environment Act B.E. 2554, TIS standards
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Medical Device Act B.E. 2551 (2008) and amendments, Thai FDA
regulatory_framework.certification: TIS certification (mandatory/voluntary per product); Thai FDA medical device registration
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: Thai FDA post-market surveillance, DLPW workplace inspections

importer_requirements: Importer or local representative must hold Thai FDA establishment licence

name: Vietnam

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Law on Occupational Safety and Health No. 84/2015/QH13, TCVN standards, MOLISA regulations
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Decree 98/2021/ND-CP on Medical Device Management, Law on Pharmacy, DMEC
regulatory_framework.certification: Medical Device Classification (A/B/C/D); Industrial PPE conformity under TCVN; CR marking for certain products
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: DMEC post-market oversight, MOLISA labour inspections

legal_representative_required: Local entity required as MAH for medical device registration

name: Malaysia

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Occupational Safety and Health Act 1994 (OSHA), Factories and Machinery Act 1967, MS standards, DOSH guidelines
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Medical Device Act 2012 (Act 737), Medical Device Regulations 2012, MDA
regulatory_framework.certification: MDA medical device registration; MS certification or SIRIM certification for industrial PPE
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: MDA post-market vigilance, DOSH workplace inspection and enforcement

authorized_representative_required: Malaysia-based Authorized Representative (AR) required for foreign medical device manufacturers

name: Indonesia

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Ministry of Manpower Regulation No. 8/2010 on PPE, SNI standards, K3 (Keselamatan dan Kesehatan Kerja)
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Ministry of Health Regulation No. 62/2017, Medical Device Distribution Permit (AKD/AKL)
regulatory_framework.certification: SNI certification mandatory for certain PPE; AKD (import) or AKL (local) distribution permit for medical devices
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: BPOM/MOH post-market surveillance, Ministry of Manpower K3 inspections

local_distributor_required: Local distributor holding distribution permit required

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Occupational Safety and Health Standards (OSHS), DOLE Department Order 198, PNS standards
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Republic Act No. 9711 (FDA Act), Administrative Order No. 2018-0002 (Medical Device Rules), PFDA
regulatory_framework.certification: PFDA Certificate of Medical Device Registration (CMDR); BPS product certification (mandatory for listed products)
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: PFDA post-market surveillance, DOLE workplace safety inspections

name: Argentina

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Resolución SRT 299/2011 (PPE certification), IRAM standards, SRT/MTEySS
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: ANMAT Disposición 2318/2002, 2319/2002, Medical Device Registration
regulatory_framework.certification: ANMAT Registration Certificate; IRAM certification recognized, SRT-approved PPE list
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: ANMAT post-market vigilance, SRT compliance audits

local_representative_required: Argentina-based Technical Director and Responsible Company required

name: Saudi Arabia

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: SASO Technical Regulations, GSO standards for GCC, SASO Quality Mark (SQM)
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: SFDA Medical Device Interim Regulation / Medical Devices Law, Saudi Medical Device Registration
regulatory_framework.certification: SFDA Medical Device Marketing Authorization (MDMA); SASO/GSO conformity certificate (CoC)
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: SFDA post-market surveillance, SASO market surveillance testing

authorized_representative_required: SFDA Authorized Representative (AR) required for foreign medical device manufacturers

name: United Arab Emirates

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: ESMA conformity assessment, UAE.S standards (derived from GSO), ECAS certification
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: MOHAP Medical Device Regulation, UAE Medical Device Registration
regulatory_framework.certification: ESMA Conformity Certificate (ECAS/EQM); MOHAP Medical Device Registration Certificate

local_representative_required: Local distributor or authorized representative required

name: Norway

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: EU 2016/425 implemented via EEA Agreement, FOR-2019-06-06-721 Norway PPE Regulation
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: EU MDR 2017/745 implemented via EEA Agreement, Norwegian Medicines Agency (NoMA)
regulatory_framework.certification: CE marking recognized under EEA rules; NoMA medical device notification
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: DSB and NoMA post-market surveillance

language_requirements: Norwegian, Swedish, Danish, or English (per product)

name: New Zealand

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Health and Safety at Work Act 2015, AS/NZS standards, WorkSafe NZ guidelines
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Medicines Act 1981, Medicines Regulations 1984, Medical Device Database (WAND), Medsafe
regulatory_framework.certification: Medsafe WAND Notification for medical devices; AS/NZS certification or equivalent
regulatory_framework.market_surveillance: Medsafe post-market monitoring, WorkSafe NZ compliance inspections

sponsor_required: New Zealand Sponsor or agent required for overseas manufacturers

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Supreme Decree No. 594/1999 (OHS), NCh standards, ISP certification
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Law 20.724, Decree 825, ISP Registration of Medical Devices
authority: ISP (medical devices, Instituto de Salud Pública)
regulatory_framework.certification: ISP Sanitary Registration; ISP certification for specific PPE (respirators, gloves)

name: Colombia

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Resolución 2400/1979, NTC standards, Ministry of Labour regulations
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Decree 4725/2005 (Medical Device Regulation), INVIMA Registration
regulatory_framework.certification: INVIMA Sanitary Registration (mandatory for medical devices); NTC compliance for industrial PPE

local_representative_required: INVIMA Registered Holder based in Colombia required

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Egyptian Labour Law No. 12/2003, ES (Egyptian Standards) adopted from ISO/EN
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: CAPA (Central Administration of Pharmaceutical Affairs) Medical Device Registration per Ministerial Decree
regulatory_framework.certification: EDA Medical Device Registration; EOS conformity certificate

name: Nigeria

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Factories Act Cap 126 LFN 2004, NIS (Nigerian Industrial Standards), SON regulations
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: NAFDAC Medical Device Registration Regulations 2021
regulatory_framework.certification: NAFDAC Registration; SON Mandatory Conformity Assessment Programme (MANCAP)

local_representative_required: Nigeria-based legal entity required for NAFDAC registration

regulatory_framework.ppe_regulation: Supreme Decree No. 005-2012-TR (OHS Law Regulations), NTP (Normas Técnicas Peruanas) standards
regulatory_framework.medical_device_regulation: Supreme Decree No. 013-2014-SA, DIGEMID Medical Device Registration
regulatory_framework.certification: DIGEMID Sanitary Registration; INACAL certification or equivalent
